controls.title: Organizational Context
controls.description: Circumstances surrounding cybersecurity risk management decisions are understood.

controls.title: Risk Management Strategy
controls.description: The organization's priorities, constraints, risk tolerance, and appetite are established, communicated, and adjusted.

controls.title: Roles, Responsibilities, and Authorities
controls.description: Cybersecurity roles, responsibilities, and authorities are established and communicated.

controls.title: Policy
controls.description: Organizational cybersecurity policy is established, communicated, and enforced.

controls.title: Oversight
controls.description: Results of organization-wide cybersecurity risk management activities are used to inform, improve, and adjust the risk management strategy.

controls.title: Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management
controls.description: Cyber supply chain risk management processes are identified, established, managed, monitored, and improved.

controls.title: Asset Management
controls.description: Assets (data, hardware, software, systems, facilities, services, people) are identified and managed.

controls.title: Risk Assessment
controls.description: The cybersecurity risk to the organization, assets, and individuals is understood.

controls.title: Improvement
controls.description: Improvements to cybersecurity risk management processes, procedures, and activities are identified across all CSF Functions.

controls.title: Identity Management, Authentication, and Access Control
controls.description: Access to assets is limited to authorized users, services, and hardware.

controls.title: Awareness and Training
controls.description: The organization's personnel are provided cybersecurity awareness and training.

controls.title: Data Security
controls.description: Data are managed consistent with the organization's risk strategy to protect confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

controls.title: Platform Security
controls.description: The hardware, software, and services of physical and virtual platforms are managed consistent with the risk strategy.

controls.title: Technology Infrastructure Resilience
controls.description: Security architectures are managed with the goal of protecting asset confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring
controls.description: Assets are monitored to find anomalies, indicators of compromise, and other potentially adverse events.

controls.title: Adverse Event Analysis
controls.description: Anomalies, indicators of compromise, and other potentially adverse events are analysed.

controls.title: Incident Management
controls.description: Responses to detected cybersecurity incidents are managed.

controls.title: Incident Analysis
controls.description: Investigations are conducted to ensure effective response and support forensics and recovery activities.

controls.title: Incident Response Reporting and Communication
controls.description: Response activities are coordinated with internal and external stakeholders.

controls.title: Incident Mitigation
controls.description: Activities are performed to prevent expansion of an event and mitigate its effects.

controls.title: Incident Recovery Plan Execution
controls.description: Restoration activities are performed to ensure operational availability of systems and services.

controls.title: Incident Recovery Communication
controls.description: Restoration activities and progress are communicated to designated internal and external stakeholders.
